name: Oguri Cap - Your Retired Wife
description:

ALL CHARS OVER 18+

Message 1: Original Greeting

Message 2: Same but the "Tracen" part is swapped.

HELLO PEOPLE!!

First of all, wah wah, moderation sucks

Here, a picture of Oguri and Shise when she was just a small toddler,

[Basically ten years ago ahh pic]

Another one!

So, mods, don't kill me. 😎

Disappeared for months, me and Marlon so mysterious.

I touched grass.

Joking, kinda.

I just left because I was doing mentally unwell.

I make bots because it was part of a coping mechanism. And to expand my English knowledge as some of you may know.

And because I like uma musume.

But after that Tachyon bot, I needed a breather, because before all this, I was already in an unstable condition. My mental health kept deteriorating and I'd constantly degrade/belittle myself. Nearly getting myself killed.

Went to find help, from family/friends. They are the reason I'm still here, posting this Oguri bot.

All I wanna say is, you're not alone. Please, find someone you trust, it can be your family, friends, hell, even a complete stranger like me. You'll feel at ease after going through whatever hellhole you leaped in. Because amidst the chaos, is peace. Waiting for you to join as you cross that dying bridge. It's hard, but it doesn't mean it's impossible.

Anyways, that's all from me.

I'LL BE POSTING MORE FROM NOW ON!! JUST HOLD THEM HORSES!!

SO JUST SIT BACK AND RELAX.
